category_sources: source_facts.description says reports from gcov test coverage program; official docs describe gcovr as managing GNU gcov and generating code coverage reports.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official documentation and GitHub repository use the name gcovr.
docs_sources: Official gcovr documentation site for version 8.6 includes user guide, command reference, cookbook, FAQ, contributing, and changelog.
repo_sources: Official gcovr documentation links to Source Code on GitHub at gcovr/gcovr.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official docs describe gcovr report formats and use with GNU gcov/GCC coverage data.
